name: kvCORE Real Estate Platform API
what_it_does: kvCORE Real Estate Platform API for brokerage-level CRM, IDX websites, and AI-driven lead generation and follow-up. Enables AI agents to manage lead capture from IDX property search for real estate buyer lead automation, handle smart CRM contact management and behavioral lead scoring for agent prioritization, access automated follow-up campaign and AI-driven communication for lead nurture automation, retrieve agent and team performance dashboards for brokerage management, manage listing management and syndication for MLS and portal distribution, handle transaction management and compliance tracking for deal lifecycle automation, access market report generation for geographic farming and seller lead generation, retrieve integration with Dotloop, SkySlope, and transaction management platforms, manage brokerage compliance and agent accountability reporting, and automate lead routing and pond (team lead pool) management for brokerage lead distribution.
use_cases: Managing brokerage lead distribution from operations agents
Automating buyer follow-up from AI lead nurture agents
Tracking agent performance from brokerage management agents
Generating seller leads from geographic farming agents
not_for: Individual agents without brokerage team infrastructure
Commercial real estate without residential brokerage focus
best_when: A residential real estate brokerage or franchise using kvCORE wants AI agents to automate lead routing, agent follow-up, brokerage compliance, and performance management across a large agent team.
avoid_when: NAR SETTLEMENT RISK: Post-2024 NAR settlement buyer agency compensation changes require updated buyer intake and disclosure workflows — automated buyer lead routing must incorporate new MLS compensation disclosure requirements. TCPA compliance — kvCORE AI-driven automated calling and texting campaigns require verified prior express written consent; robocall and SMS automation without consent creates TCPA class action exposure. MLS IDX data use — IDX feed data has strict display rules and data use restrictions; automated lead capture from IDX property searches must comply with MLS IDX rules and RETS/RESO data use agreements.

auth.notes: kvCORE uses API key authentication. REST API with JSON. API access via Inside Real Estate partner program. Webhooks for CRM events. Murray, Utah HQ (Inside Real Estate). Founded 2012. Inside Real Estate acquired kvCORE (2018). Private (Lovell Minnick PE-backed). 300,000+ real estate agent users. kvCORE is the dominant mid-to-large brokerage platform. Competes with Follow Up Boss, Sierra Interactive, and BoomTown for brokerage CRM.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-agent monthly subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-agent monthly subscription; brokerage enterprise pricing
pricing.notes: Murray, UT. Inside Real Estate. Founded 2012. Lovell Minnick PE-backed. 300,000+ agent users. Dominant brokerage CRM platform. Competes with Follow Up Boss and Sierra Interactive.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented per partner integration

known_agent_gotchas: NAR SETTLEMENT COMPLIANCE: Post-2024 NAR settlement buyer agency compensation disclosure requirements must be incorporated into automated buyer lead intake; non-compliant automation creates fair housing and NAR ethics complaint exposure
TCPA automated calling/texting — kvCORE AI dialer and automated SMS campaigns require prior express written consent; automated campaigns to unverified leads create TCPA class action exposure

MLS IDX data restrictions — IDX feed data use is governed by MLS member rules and RESO data use agreements; automated lead enrichment using IDX property data must comply with display rules and data portability restrictions
Brokerage pond management — automated lead pond assignment and agent rotation must implement fair rotation to avoid Fair Housing Act implications in geographic lead assignment
Agent accountability automation — automated agent performance reporting to brokerage creates independent contractor classification risk; avoid automated management-like directives to IC agents
Partner API access — kvCORE API access requires Inside Real Estate partner program enrollment; not self-service developer access
agent_readiness.security_notes: Real estate brokerage CRM. SOC2. API key auth. US. Lead, agent, and transaction data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Brokerage CRM. SOC2. API key. US. Lead and agent data.
